rationale: Educ. Code §7.031 governs TEA's authority to seek and distribute grants. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The agency may seek, accept, and distribute grants awarded by the federal government or any other public or private entity for the benefit of public education
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
